# AGENTS.md — Import xGest Odoo

## Project Overview

Helping scripts to ease import between xGest and Odoo ERPs.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/import-xgest-odoo](https://github.com/GeiserX/import-xgest-odoo)
- **Language:** R
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
